programme.title: Akaash Vani
programme.desc: Akaash and Vani love each other but she is forced to marry Ravi, an abusive man.

programme.title: Joggers' Park
programme.desc: Chaos erupt when former judge Jyotin Chatterjee falls for Jenny, a young woman.

programme.title: The Last Color
programme.desc: A young tightrope walker befriends a widow who wishes to play Holi but cannot do so..

programme.title: Daddy
programme.desc: Arun Gawli becomes one of India's most notable gangsters before he ventures into politics.

programme.title: Poorna
programme.desc: Poorna Malavath, a 13-year-old girl from Telangana, becomes the youngest female in history to climb and reach the summit of Mount Everest.

programme.title: Attack
programme.desc: Arjun participates in an experiment to defend the nation from terrorists and seek revenge.

programme.title: Vicky Donor
programme.desc: Vicky works as a sperm donor for Dr Baldev Chaddha and boosts the clinic's success.

programme.title: Judgementall Hai Kya
programme.desc: Bobby rents out a portion of her house to a young couple but is suspicious of the man.

programme.title: Happy Bhag Jayegi
programme.desc: An Indian runaway bride mistakenly arrives at the home of a Pakistani politician.

programme.title: Bareilly Ki Barfi
programme.desc: After reading a book that reflects her life, Bitti sets out to find its author.

programme.title: Badlapur
programme.desc: An ordinary man's hunger for revenge gradually turns him into a cold-blooded murderer.

programme.title: Lost
programme.desc: A journalist tries to uncover the truth behind the disappearance of a young activist.

programme.title: Chakravyuh
programme.desc: Kabir infiltrates a Maoist organisation to help Adil Khan, who is a police officer and his friend.

programme.title: India Lockdown
programme.desc: The lives of four Indians are thrown into turmoil a nationwide lockdown is declared.

programme.title: Happy Ending
programme.desc: Yudi, a writer seeks a story but finds love with acclaimed novelist Aanchal.

programme.title: Firaaq
programme.desc: The victims of the 2002 Gujarat riots grapple with the aftermath of the devastation.

programme.title: Udta Punjab
programme.desc: The lives of four individuals intertwine during an era of drug abuse in Punjab, India.

programme.title: Kahaani 2: Durga Rani Singh
programme.desc: Vidya's past is revealed when she meets with an accident after her daughter's kidnapping.

programme.title: Mard Ko Dard Nahi Hota
programme.desc: A young man who cannot feel pain sets out to learn martial arts to catch criminals.

programme.title: Mission Majnu
programme.desc: An undercover Indian spy takes on a deadly mission to expose a covert nuclear weapons program in the heart of Pakistan that could destroy the free world.

programme.title: Tejas
programme.desc: A brave Indian pilot sets on a mission to rescue a spy from Pakistan who holds confidential information and faces her inner fears from the past.

programme.title: Swatantra Veer Savarkar
programme.desc: Vinayak Damodar Savarkar joins India's freedom struggle and faces severe incidents.

programme.title: Dedh Bigha Zameen
programme.desc: A man decides to sell his land to get his sister married, but obstacles arise when a powerful political figure opposes him.

programme.title: Darling 2
programme.desc: Five friends on a holiday in Valparai find their getaway turning eerie when they sense the haunting presence of a friend who recently died by suicide.

programme.title: Fool N Final
programme.desc: A heist to find a precious diamond goes hilariously wrong when the group of thieves decide to escape the clutches of their leader.

programme.title: Fool N Final
programme.desc: A heist to find a precious diamond goes hilariously wrong when the group of thieves decide to escape the clutches of their leader.

programme.title: Ruslaan
programme.desc: Ruslaan, a terrorist's son, undergoes a major life change when an anti-terrorism officer adopts him. Determined to fix his bad reputation, Ruslaan becomes an intelligence agent.

programme.title: Gatta Kusthi
programme.desc: Veera has a preconceived set of criteria for what he wants in a bride. However, he ends up unexpectedly marrying a woman who is the complete opposite of his expectations.

programme.title: Liger - Saala Crossbreed
programme.desc: A talented young MMA fighter trains hard to rise up the ranks. However, his goals are hindered when his lover is kidnapped.

programme.title: Rocketry: The Nambi Effect
programme.desc: The life of Nambi Narayanan is full of struggles and accomplishments as an aerospace engineer. However, he faces his biggest challenge while working at ISRO when the world accuses him of treason.

programme.title: Saindhav
programme.desc: A man with a traumatic past is compelled to encounter an crime boss so that he can rescue his daughter from a health problem.

programme.title: Mardaani 2
programme.desc: A twenty-one-year-old psychopath has an affinity towards raping and murdering young woman. But, a cop, Shivani Shivaji Roy, is on his heels as she tries to bring him to justice.

programme.title: A Wednesday!
programme.desc: Prakash Rathod, a retired police commissioner recounts the most memorable case of his career wherein he was informed about a bomb scare in Mumbai by an ordinary commoner.

programme.title: Dove
programme.desc: Anoop and Aditi love each other but face an unexpected obstacle when Anoop gets charged with murder. Meanwhile, Kumar and Sona, who share an intimate relationship, try to overcome their challenges.

programme.title: House No. 13
programme.desc: A family moves into a new home and experiences paranormal events. However, one by one, the family members start getting killed making the head of the family investigate the cause and stop the deaths.

programme.title: 1947: Earth
programme.desc: A young Parsi girl discovers the truth about human nature as friends turn foes while the city is set aflame during partition.

programme.title: Bajrangi Bhaijaan
programme.desc: Pawan Chaturvedi rises above the divisive bounds of nationality and religion to help a little Pakistani girl stranded in India.

programme.title: Gajaana
programme.desc: On an adventurous search for treasure in the dense forest, a group of young explorers soon discovers they have become the quarry.

programme.title: Dashing CM Bharat
programme.desc: Bharat, a graduate from Oxford, is forced to take up his father's position as the chief minister after his sudden death. He tries to reform the corrupt society but faces obstacles from his enemies.

programme.title: Gabbar Is Back
programme.desc: The city's administration wrongs Aditya, a commoner. To avenge his tragedy, he disguises himself as a vigilante, Gabbar, and teams up with honest government officers to expose the corrupt.

programme.title: Bhagavanth Kesari
programme.desc: A former prisoner is adamant about training his adoptive daughter to join the Indian Army. However, his mission is interrupted by a conflict with a ruthless businessman.

programme.title: Fidaa
programme.desc: An NRI medical student falls in love with a vivacious woman. However, they face challenges in their relationship due to their differences in personalities.

programme.title: Hundred
programme.desc: All eyes will be on Australian star Steve Smith as Welsh Fire battles the Manchester Originals at home.

programme.title: The Hundred Mini
programme.desc: The battle at Edgbaston will see the Birmingham Phoenix's Liam Livingstone go head-to-head with a tough Oval Invincibles side that includes Australian bowler Jason Behrendorff.

programme.title: T20 Mini AUS v SA
programme.desc: Game 2: With Tim David's fantastic performance securing a 1-0 series lead, Australia now aims to extend its winning streak to 10 consecutive T20 victories.

programme.title: The Hundred Women's Mini
programme.desc: Australian blockbuster takes center stage in Birmingham as Ellyse Perry's Phoenix go head-to-head with Meg Lanning's Oval Invincibles.

programme.title: T20 AUS v SA
programme.desc: Australia's impressive lineup gets even better with the return of Travis Head and Josh Hazlewood, while South Africa aims for an upset in Darwin.

programme.title: T20 AUS v SA
programme.desc: Game 2: With Tim David's fantastic performance securing a 1-0 series lead, Australia now aims to extend its winning streak to 10 consecutive T20 victories.

programme.title: The Hundred Mini
programme.desc: The battle at Edgbaston will see the Birmingham Phoenix's Liam Livingstone go head-to-head with a tough Oval Invincibles side that includes Australian bowler Jason Behrendorff.

programme.title: T20 Mini AUS v SA
programme.desc: Game 2: With Tim David's fantastic performance securing a 1-0 series lead, Australia now aims to extend its winning streak to 10 consecutive T20 victories.

programme.title: The Hundred Women's Mini
programme.desc: Australian blockbuster takes center stage in Birmingham as Ellyse Perry's Phoenix go head-to-head with Meg Lanning's Oval Invincibles.

programme.title: The Hundred Mini
programme.desc: Southern Brave's Utilita Bowl fortress will be put to the test by the Northern Superchargers.

programme.title: T20 Mini AUS v SA
programme.desc: Game 2: With Tim David's fantastic performance securing a 1-0 series lead, Australia now aims to extend its winning streak to 10 consecutive T20 victories.

programme.title: The Hundred Women's Mini
programme.desc: Southern Brave with Sophie Devine, take on Annabel Sutherland's Superchargers at The Rose Bowl.

programme.title: T20 AUS v SA
programme.desc: Game 2: With Tim David's fantastic performance securing a 1-0 series lead, Australia now aims to extend its winning streak to 10 consecutive T20 victories.

programme.title: The Hundred Mini
programme.desc: All eyes will be on Australian star Steve Smith as Welsh Fire battles the Manchester Originals at home.

programme.title: T20 Mini AUS v SA
programme.desc: Game 2: With Tim David's fantastic performance securing a 1-0 series lead, Australia now aims to extend its winning streak to 10 consecutive T20 victories.

programme.title: The Hundred Women's Mini
programme.desc: Jess Jonassen's Welsh Fire light up Sophia Garden against Beth Mooney's Manchester Originals.

programme.desc: Southern Brave's Utilita Bowl fortress will be put to the test by the Northern Superchargers.

programme.title: Hundred W
programme.desc: Grace Harris's London Spirit take on the spin of Ash Gardner and Alana King’s Trent Rockets at the historic Lords.

programme.title: Hundred
programme.desc: David Warner will be hoping for a good performance at Lord's. London Spirit face a Trent Rockets side who are strong title contenders.

programme.desc: The new Antigua and Barbuda franchise, makes its debut against St Kitts and Nevis at Warner Park.

programme.title: T20 Classic
programme.desc: A young David Warner makes his Australian international debut with a memorable opening performance at the MCG.

programme.title: The Hundred Mini
programme.desc: David Warner will be hoping for a good performance at Lord's. London Spirit face a Trent Rockets side who are strong title contenders.

programme.title: The Hundred Women's Mini

programme.title: The Hundred Mini
programme.desc: David Warner will be hoping for a good performance at Lord's. London Spirit face a Trent Rockets side who are strong title contenders.

programme.title: Hundred W
programme.desc: Phoebe Litchfield and Annabel Sutherland face off against their Australian teammates Ellyse Perry and Megan Schutt in Headingley.

programme.title: THE HUNDRED Men's - M10 Hlts
programme.desc: The back-to-back reigning Men's Hundred champions Oval Invincibles travel to Liam Livingstone's winless Phoenix. Sam Billings' side have two wins from two in their 2025 defence. (12.08)

programme.title: The Hundred
programme.desc: Off to the perfect start in 2025, last year's runners-up Southern Brave - skippered by James Vince - take on Harry Brook's Northern Superchargers in Southampton at the Rose Bowl.

programme.title: THE HUNDRED Men's - M10 Hlts
programme.desc: The back-to-back reigning Men's Hundred champions Oval Invincibles travel to Liam Livingstone's winless Phoenix. Sam Billings' side have two wins from two in their 2025 defence. (12.08)

programme.title: THE HUNDRED Women's - M10 Hlts
programme.desc: After falling short again, the Invincibles go to Birmingham on the back of consecutive defeats. Ellyse Perry's Phoenix also target a return to form after defeat to Southern Brave. (12.08)

programme.title: The Hundred
programme.desc: In the Women's Hundred, Welsh Fire take on Manchester Originals. Tammy Beaumont's Welsh Fire are still looking to get off the mark after consecutive defeats to start the new campaign.

programme.title: THE HUNDRED Women's - M7 Hlts
programme.desc: In the Women's Hundred, Georgia Adams' Southern Brave - who got off to a winning start in their opening game - compete with Ellyse Perry's Birmingham Phoenix in Southampton. (10.08)

programme.title: THE HUNDRED Men's - M11 Hlts
programme.desc: Off to the perfect start in 2025, last year's runners-up Southern Brave - skippered by James Vince - take on Harry Brook's Northern Superchargers in Southampton at the Rose Bowl. (13.08)

programme.title: THE HUNDRED Women's - M11 Hlts
programme.desc: Two from two, the in-form Southern Brave host the equally impressive Northern Superchargers in the Women's Hundred. Whose perfect start to the campaign will end at the Rose Bowl? (13.08)

programme.title: The Hundred
programme.desc: Jos Buttler and the Originals go in search of a second win of the season in Cardiff against Jonny Bairstow's winless Welsh Fire. Bairstow smacked 86 runs in defeat to London Spirit.

programme.title: THE HUNDRED Men's - M12 Hlts
programme.desc: Jos Buttler and the Originals go in search of a second win of the season in Cardiff against Jonny Bairstow's winless Welsh Fire. Bairstow smacked 86 runs in defeat to London Spirit. (13.08)

programme.title: THE HUNDRED Women's - M12 Hlts
programme.desc: In the Women's Hundred, Welsh Fire take on Manchester Originals. Tammy Beaumont's Welsh Fire are still looking to get off the mark after consecutive defeats to start the campaign. (13.08)

programme.desc: The back-to-back reigning Men's Hundred champions Oval Invincibles travel to Liam Livingstone's winless Phoenix. Sam Billings' side have two wins from two in their 2025 defence. (12.08)

programme.desc: Off to the perfect start in 2025, last year's runners-up Southern Brave - skippered by James Vince - take on Harry Brook's Northern Superchargers in Southampton at the Rose Bowl. (13.08)

programme.desc: Two from two, the in-form Southern Brave host the equally impressive Northern Superchargers in the Women's Hundred. Whose perfect start to the campaign will end at the Rose Bowl? (13.08)

programme.title: The Hundred
programme.desc: In the Women's Hundred, Northern Superchargers compete with Birmingham Phoenix.

programme.title: Saaya
programme.desc: Akash and Maya, two doctors, are happily married and expecting a baby. However, things take a turn when Maya's bus crashes and she is believed to be dead.

programme.title: Resident Evil: Extinction
programme.desc: During a zombie apocalypse engineered by the Umbrella Corporation, Alice and a group of survivors journey across the country in search of supplies and a safe place.

programme.title: Jeans
programme.desc: Madhumita and Vishwanathan fall in love with each other but his father disapproves of the relationship as he wants his twin sons to marry two identical twins.

programme.title: Daddy
programme.desc: Arun Gawli, a young man, is forced to turn to crime for making a livelihood. However, what starts with a simple 'matka' gambling ring, soon turns into a full-fledged criminal network.

programme.title: Batti Gul Meter Chalu
programme.desc: The life of three friends takes a tragic turn due to an inflated electricity bill, which leads to a courtroom drama and social awakening.

programme.title: Baaghi: Rebels in Love
programme.desc: A martial artist faces his biggest test when he has to travel to Bangkok to rescue the woman he loves from the clutches of his romantic rival.

programme.title: Wedding Pullav
programme.desc: Karan and Anushka are best friends. When Karan marries Riya, Anushka is going to marry Jay. Do fate and love have a twist in store for them?

programme.title: Badla
programme.desc: When a woman is accused of killing her lover, a renowned lawyer is hired -- but the more they try to untangle the truth, the more convoluted it becomes.

programme.title: Pralay: the Destroyer
programme.desc: When a criminal gang slaughters an entire family, the baby survives. He is taken in by a family and the forces of nature work together to bring him face to face with the gang again when he grows up.

programme.title: Baar Baar Dekho
programme.desc: The highs and lows of a romantic relationship are examined through flashbacks and flash-forwards.

programme.title: Saand Ki Aankh
programme.desc: This biographical movie narrates the story of Chandro and Prakashi Tomar, who defied ageism and patriarchy to take up shooting in their 60s.

programme.title: Wedding Pullav
programme.desc: Karan and Anushka are best friends. When Karan marries Riya, Anushka is going to marry Jay. Do fate and love have a twist in store for them?

programme.title: Badla
programme.desc: When a woman is accused of killing her lover, a renowned lawyer is hired -- but the more they try to untangle the truth, the more convoluted it becomes.

programme.title: Pralay: the Destroyer
programme.desc: When a criminal gang slaughters an entire family, the baby survives. He is taken in by a family and the forces of nature work together to bring him face to face with the gang again when he grows up.

programme.title: Baar Baar Dekho
programme.desc: The highs and lows of a romantic relationship are examined through flashbacks and flash-forwards.

programme.title: Saand Ki Aankh
programme.desc: This biographical movie narrates the story of Chandro and Prakashi Tomar, who defied ageism and patriarchy to take up shooting in their 60s.

programme.title: Rock on 2
programme.desc: Adi decides to host a grand charity concert along with the rest of the members of Magik, a rock band. However, the constant opposition from the local authorities creates hurdles in their pursuit.

programme.title: Zero
programme.desc: Through his relationships with two wildly different women, a vertically challenged bachelor with a larger-than-life persona must discover his purpose.

programme.title: Dabangg 2
programme.desc: Chulbul Pandey, a wayward policeman, kills the brother of a crooked politician. In retribution, the politician sends his henchmen to attack Chulbul's wife which leaves Chulbul infuriated.

programme.title: Vasudha
programme.desc: Though they have different perspectives, the amiable and endearing Vasudha works as a housekeeper in Chandrika, a business tycoon's house. S01 E291.

programme.title: Kumkum Bhagya
programme.desc: Pragya and Abhi find their lives entwined in a cruel twist of fate. However, despite their initial aversion towards one another, they fall in love and fight to be together against all odds. S01 E3153.

programme.title: Jamai No. 1
programme.desc: A devoted son-in-law navigates the complexities of married life in an attempt to maintain a balance in the family dynamics of his wife's household. S01 E233.

programme.title: Ek Nazar
programme.desc: Check out this awesome compilation of trailers for the hottest upcoming movies and music videos! Get a sneak peek at what's coming soon and add them to your must-watch list!

programme.title: Jamai No. 1
programme.desc: A devoted son-in-law navigates the complexities of married life in an attempt to maintain a balance in the family dynamics of his wife's household. S01 E233.

programme.title: Jagriti - Ek Nayi Subah
programme.desc: Suraj declares undying devotion to Jagriti. Later, he tenderly aids with her sari, vowing eternal support and companionship. S01 E334.

programme.title: Saru
programme.desc: Ved discovers Gauri is making arrangements for Saru's wedding. Separately, Gauri informs her father, Sitaram, about seeing Chandrakant and Kamini at the temple. S01 E05.

programme.title: Tum Se Tum Tak
programme.desc: Tum Se Tum Tak S01 E38.

programme.desc: Reet, a career-oriented woman, finds it difficult to deal with the societal pressures of marriage alongside navigating her life as a journalist. S01 E248.

programme.desc: A kabaddi player with aspirations of becoming a district commissioner leaves Rajasthan for Mumbai to attend college, balancing her ambitions while fighting for her mother's rightful family status. S01 E92.

programme.title: Jamai No. 1
programme.desc: Neil plans Shashank and Riya's wedding and returns Riddhi's car, but Riddhi retaliates by burning it. Meanwhile, Kanchan sabotages Neil's career during a job interview. S01 E05.

programme.desc: Suraj declares undying devotion to Jagriti. Later, he tenderly aids with her sari, vowing eternal support and companionship. S01 E334.

programme.desc: A kabaddi player with aspirations of becoming a district commissioner leaves Rajasthan for Mumbai to attend college, balancing her ambitions while fighting for her mother's rightful family status. S01 E92.

programme.desc: Famous female celebrities and television personalities leave their luxurious lifestyles and modern comforts behind to experience rural life and the challenges it brings in an Indian village. S01 E11.
